message:
fix(suggest): preserve canonical project label casing in label suggestions

- Add canonical_project_labels() that tallies label variants across all
  issues and picks the most-common casing (e.g. "Backend" over "backend")
- Use canonical casing in suggestion summaries, action commands, and
  metadata so 'br update' commands emit the project-standard form
- Add tests for canonical label preservation and variant preference
- Update beads history snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
